name: Today
detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely. Some of the storms could be severe. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 81. Southwest wind 10 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.

name: Tonight
shortForecast: Scattered Severe T-storms then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
detailedForecast: Scattered thunderstorms before 8pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 8pm and 9pm, then showers and thunderstorms likely between 9pm and 10pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 10pm and 11pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 11pm and 2am. Some of the storms could be severe. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 63. West wind 5 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

name: Wednesday
detailedForecast: Partly sunny, with a high near 74. Northwest wind 6 to 10 mph.

name: Wednesday Night
detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 53. North wind 0 to 10 mph.
